sections.paragraph:
Original: אוּץ

Transliteration: 'ûts

Phonetic: oots

BDB Definition:

  1. to press, be pressed, make haste, urge, be narrow
    1. (Qal)
      1. to press, hasten
      2. to be pressed, confined, narrow
      3. to hasten, make haste
      4. be narrow
    2. (Hiphil)
      1. to urge, insist
      2. to hasten

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 51

Part(s) of speech: Verb
